title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Alex Hormozi's AI usage strategy through a 4-pillar system: data as competitive advantage, voice-first approach, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The video highlights a common operational mistake that required a company-wide correction memo.
